## Describe the Bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include any error messages shown in the UI.

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Gantry version | e.g. v0.1.0 |
| Deployment method | Binary / Docker / From source |
| OS | e.g. Ubuntu 24.04 / macOS 15 / Windows Server 2022 |
| Browser | e.g. Chrome 130, Firefox 132 |

## Logs

Paste relevant log output below (check the terminal where `gantry serve` is running).

**Remove any secrets, passwords, or credentials before posting.**

```
(paste logs here)
```

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or configuration snippets (no passwords) here.
